name: Ubiquiti Gigabit Power Adapter POE-24-30W-G-WH
title: Ubiquiti Gigabit Power Adapter POE-24-30W-G-WH
description: The Ubiquiti POE-24-30W-G-WH is a compact, high-efficiency Power over Ethernet (PoE) injector designed to deliver both power and data through a single Ethernet cable, primarily targeting devices within the Ubiquiti family that demand higher power inputs. Its refined white casing not only complements modern network environments aesthetically but also serves to integrate discreetly in various installation backgrounds.

detailed_description.heading: Overview
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti POE-24-30W-G-WH is a compact, high-efficiency Power over Ethernet (PoE) injector designed to deliver both power and data through a single Ethernet cable, primarily targeting devices within the Ubiquiti family that demand higher power inputs. Its refined white casing not only complements modern network environments aesthetically but also serves to integrate discreetly in various installation backgrounds.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text: Features: Surge protection, Clamping protection, Maximum surge discharge, Peak pulse current, AC cable with earth ground.

detailed_description.heading: Power and Performance
detailed_description.text: This injector provides an output of 25VDC at 1.25A, providing a total power output of 30 watts, sufficient for supporting a range of Ubiquiti devices that require a robust power supply. Moreover, it's equipped with a Gigabit LAN port. This feature is crucial for maintaining high-speed data transfer, essential for optimal performance in network systems that handle large volumes of data or are engaged in high-speed communications.

detailed_description.heading: Electrical and Safety Specifications
detailed_description.text: This PoE injector is designed to operate on a broad input voltage spectrum from 100-240VAC, accommodating frequencies of 50/60Hz. This versatility makes it suitable for a wide array of electrical environments globally. The injector's inrush current is managed effectively, peaking at less than 60A at 120VAC and less than 120A at 230VAC, which ensures device stability and safety during potential power surges. The unit operates with an impressive 83%+ efficiency rate, significantly reducing energy waste and enhancing overall energy management in network operations. It maintains a maximum output ripple of just 1%, thereby ensuring a stable power supply. Safety and durability are enhanced by differential and common mode surge protection, with clamping protection rated at 11V for data and 60V for power. It's equipped to handle a maximum surge discharge of 1500A for power and a peak pulse current of 36A for data. With certifications from CE, FCC, IC, and UL, the Ubiquiti POE-24-30W-G-WH meets rigorous international standards, assuring users of its safety, reliability, and performance in powering high-demand network devices.
